fields.label: Window (seconds)
fields.description: Refill window for the token buckets. Blank = code default (60).

fields.label: Per-token Rate (records/window)
fields.description: Sustained records per window for ONE partner. 0 = unlimited per-token. Blank = code default (1200).

fields.label: Per-token Burst
fields.description: Per-partner bucket capacity (max instantaneous burst). 0 = unlimited. Blank = code default (1200).

fields.label: Global Rate (records/window)
fields.description: Sustained records per window across ALL partners combined. 0 = unlimited global. Blank = code default (6000).

fields.label: Global Burst
fields.description: Global bucket capacity (max instantaneous burst across all partners). 0 = unlimited. Blank = code default (6000).

fields.label: Bulk Max Records
fields.description: Max records per bulk write call. 0 is rejected (an unbounded bulk is a footgun). Blank = code default (100).

fields.label: List Max Page
fields.description: Max records returned per read/list call. 0 is rejected. Blank = code default (200).

fields.label: List Default Page
fields.description: Page size when the caller omits `limit`. 0 is rejected. Blank = code default (20).

fields.label: File Download Timeout (seconds)
fields.description: Timeout when re-hosting an attachment from a partner-supplied source URL. 0 is rejected. Blank = code default (30).

fields.label: File Download Max Size (MB)
fields.description: Max size (MB) of an attachment re-hosted from a partner-supplied source URL; a larger download is rejected. 0 is rejected. Blank = code default (25).
